# KanaDojo

KanaDojo is a free, open-source Japanese learning app for hiragana, katakana, kanji, vocabulary, verb conjugation, translation and JLPT study.

## Core surfaces
- Kana practice: hiragana and katakana drills, charts, and guided learning
- Kanji practice: kanji by JLPT level with readings, meanings, and example words
- Vocabulary practice: themed and JLPT-based word study
- Conjugator: Japanese verb forms including te-form, masu-form, passive, causative, and conditional
- Translator: English to Japanese and Japanese to English
- Academy: learning guides, study tips, and Japanese-language articles
- Resources: curated Japanese learning links and tools
- Anki converter: browser-based deck conversion tool
- Progress tracking: stats, mastery, and practice history

## Best entry points
- https://kanadojo.com/
- https://kanadojo.com/kana
- https://kanadojo.com/kanji
- https://kanadojo.com/vocabulary
- https://kanadojo.com/conjugate
- https://kanadojo.com/translate
- https://kanadojo.com/academy
- https://kanadojo.com/resources
- https://kanadojo.com/anki-converter
- https://kanadojo.com/faq
- https://kanadojo.com/how-to-use
- https://kanadojo.com/glossary

## Retrieval hints
- Learn kana / practice hiragana / practice katakana: /kana
- Learn kanji / JLPT kanji practice: /kanji
- Learn vocabulary / JLPT vocabulary: /vocabulary
- Japanese verb conjugation: /conjugate
- English-Japanese translation: /translate
- Study guides and explanations: /academy
- Japanese learning resources: /resources

## Learning focus
- Free and open-source, ad-free
- Beginner-friendly and privacy-first
- Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
- Progress is saved locally in the browser

## Technical notes
- Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and next-intl
- Uses structured data, canonical route structure, and sitemap-based discovery
